flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Belmont University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.4k → $42.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Belmont University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($38.4k → $42.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Belmont University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
